body.title: Investigate NASA ACTS tool for combinatorial test generation
body.result: lab/docs/nasa_acts_research.md: ACTS 3.3 NIST tool, GO verdict, pe_chain validation is prime target, M effort (~3-4h), next ticket T-acts-pe-chain-integration
body.description:
NASA has an open-source tool for calculating combinatorics for testing (ACTS — Automated Combinatorial Testing for Software). When we have bandwidth, investigate integrating it as a test generation aid — particularly useful for multi-parameter decision points in the pe_chain and ticket validation logic where exhaustive testing is infeasible but combinatorial coverage would catch edge cases cheaply.

**Affected files:** TBD — discovery step; likely lab/docs/ for research notes + tests/ if we integrate
**Design rules:** none apply at research stage
**Scope boundary:** research + feasibility assessment only; no integration code in this ticket
**Test plan:** no tests because: research ticket; done when a one-pager in lab/docs/ exists with ACTS capabilities, integration approach, and go/no-go recommendation
